creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
I've created a minimal reproducer available at [1], as well as an excerpt of `make -d A` in a/b/c of that tar- available at [2]. I can dig into this further this weekend, perhaps.

[1] https://people.freebsd.org/~kevans/mkbug.tar
[2] https://people.freebsd.org/~kevans/mkbug.txt
